title: Gas Piping System Inspection Certification
keyFacts: Owners of covered buildings submit GPS2 through the DOB online portal.
Buildings that do not contain gas piping still submit a GPS2 certification stating that the building does not contain gas piping.
The no-gas-piping certification may be signed and sealed by either a registered design professional or a licensed master plumber.
The NYC311 article still presents the baseline late-filing penalty framing as $5,000.
